message:
test(fcp-conformance/host-enforcement-pipeline): pin PipelineOutcome + EnforcementDecision counters + 11-check name registry (resolves flywheel_connectors-fam66)

21 tests complementing host_enforcement_config_contract_conformance.
Pins the dynamic side of the host enforcement pipeline.

- PipelineOutcome Allow/Deny variants + is_allow/is_deny predicates;
  Deny carries check_name + reason_code + explanation
- EnforcementDecision::is_allowed delegates to outcome.is_allow;
  checks_executed == checks_run.len(); allow_count + skip_count
  filter only the matching CheckOutcome variant; zero counts for
  empty checks_run
- CheckRecord field preservation (name, outcome, elapsed_ms)
- 11-check name registry: every documented EnforcementCheck struct
  returns the expected snake_case identifier (canonical_decode,
  zone_membership, capability_verify, holder_proof,
  checkpoint_freshness, taint_approval, policy_ceiling,
  connector_manifest, rate_limit, budget, revocation)
- Critical: RevocationCheck is "revocation" NOT "revocation_freshness"
  — the host's combined check covers both membership AND freshness;
  drift would split audit-trail name from executing check
- All 11 names distinct (no duplicates) + snake_case ASCII validation
  (lowercase + digits + underscore, no leading/trailing _)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
